name: Industry Analyst Relations at Spring IDF 2005 — Peter Kastner Delegate Confirmation Letter
description: Intel Analyst Relations personalized schedule for Peter Kastner (Vericours, Inc., P.O. Box 3480, Westport MA) for Spring IDF 2005 at Moscone West, San Francisco, March 1-3. Features Craig Barrett opening keynote, multicore briefing, Digital Enterprise/Digital Office luncheon and keynote, Sean Maloney mobile briefing, Virtualization Technology 101 briefing, Flash Products Group briefing, TMG (Technology & Manufacturing) briefing, UWB/Wireless USB briefing at W Hotel, Justin Rattner R&D keynote, CE-ATA briefing, and CTO panel. Documents a complete analyst-access schedule six months before the Fall IDF 2005 event.

creator.name: Liz Ryon (Intel SAS-Industry Analyst Relations Group)
